name: Spicy Sausage Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sweet red bell pepper, diced
1/2 cup Vidalia or sweet onion, diced
1 tablespoon fresh cilantro or parsley, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove seeds and membranes from jalapeno and banana peppers if desired (for a less spicy salsa).
2. Dice the peppers and place them in a bowl.
3. Add remaining salsa ingredients and mix well.
4. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Form the sausage into six patties.
6. Cook in a skillet over medium heat until the meat is no longer pink.
7. Place each patty on an English muffin half.
8. Top with 1 tablespoon of salsa and a slice of cheese.
9. Cover with the other muffin half.
10. Serve remaining salsa on the side.
11. Yield: 6 servings.
